disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Allogeneic stem cell (bone marrow) transplant approximately 14 months ago for leukaemia; on ongoing systemic immunosuppression
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any major medical conditions?
Have you had any transplants or cancer treatment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He had a donor stem cell transplant about 14 months ago for leukaemia, and he's been on immune-suppressing tablets ever since.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute worsening of breathlessness over 48 hours, now breathless at rest and unable to walk more than a couple of steps
trigger_question_examples: Can you walk around, or are you short of breath at rest?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The breathing got a lot worse over the last day or two — he's gasping just sitting still now and can't walk more than a step or two.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing dry, non-productive cough that has sharply worsened; no purulent sputum reported
trigger_question_examples: Are you coughing? Is anything coming up?
Is the cough dry or are you bringing up phlegm?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a dry, hacking cough with nothing coming up — it's been there a while but it's much worse now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Absence of fever by patient report tonight (immunocompromised host — a screening question, not a reassuring finding)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers, chills or shakes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever that he's noticed tonight, and he hasn't checked a thermometer.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive thick, tight, hyperpigmented skin over trunk and upper limbs with joint stiffness/contractures, developing over ~3 months
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the skin changes.
How long has the skin been tight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Over the last few months his skin on the chest and arms has gone thick, tight and darker, and his elbows are getting hard to straighten.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe dry, gritty eyes and severe dry mouth with reduced saliva
trigger_question_examples: Any problems with your eyes or mouth?
Are your eyes or mouth dry?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His eyes are really dry and gritty and his mouth is so dry there's almost no spit.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Ongoing systemic immunosuppressant therapy taken regularly (patient believes tacrolimus)
trigger_question_examples: Is he on anything for the transplant?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He takes an immune-suppressing tablet every day — he thinks it's called tacrolimus — plus eye drops and skin ointment.

patient_initiated_exchanges.trigger_condition: Patient or spouse expresses fear about the transplant failing or terminal decline
patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Is his transplant failing? Is he going to be able to breathe through the night?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Acknowledge the fear honestly, avoid minting a prognosis or a diagnosis, be clear this level of breathlessness with his transplant history needs emergency in-person assessment now, and give a concrete escalation plan.
